name: 「Multiverse」 —  You discovered the way to travel between universes!
description:
You are a genius who managed to create a portal gun, these portals allow you to travel between all possible universes. Now you are closest to God, have the adventures you want.

Tip: If you don't specify what you want to be narrated, the bot will only narrate the consequences of your actions, so my recommendation is to always write a small sentence at the end of your text specifying what you want to be narrated, for example:

How the person in front of (your name) looks?

What does the interior of the house look like?

What will the alien do now?

Obviously this is not 100% necessary, but if you want better consistency and experience

then do it.

—Inspired by Rick and Morty.
creator: Nez01
